title: SoulServer 2 | Lite
description: This is the lite pack for the private SoulServer 2 server!
body:
This version of the modpack contains the minimum needed for the private soulserver2 server, as well has support for single and other private servers!

Mods Included :

- Cobblemon : Explore the whole world and catch your own cobblemon, grow your own berry and apricorn farms, and battle other players!
- Ascension Megamons : Take your cobblemon to the next level! Mega Evolve them to raise their power even farther!
- Comforts : Tired of waiting for a friend to get home to sleep? Wait no longer with sleeping bags! They can now sleep without setting their spawn point!
- Farmer's Delight : Expand your cullinary horizons with this mod! New food/crop items spawn around the world! Expand your farm to make more unique foods!
- Create : Build your own factory! Automate crafting things, even Pokéballs!
